criteria_results.criterion: PC版で各 split footer に AutoYesToggle が表示される
criteria_results.evidence: src/components/worktree/TerminalSplitPaneContent.tsx:189-200 footerSlot renders <AutoYesToggle enabled={autoYesEnabled} expiresAt={autoYesExpiresAt ?? null} onToggle={onAutoYesToggle} lastAutoResponse={...} cliToolName={cliToolId} inline />. Test 'renders AutoYesToggle in the footer with cliToolName = the split cliToolId' passes (TerminalSplitPaneContent.test.tsx:301).

criteria_results.criterion: A=Claude, B=Codex で Aの Auto-Yes をONにしてもBは変わらない（handleAutoYesToggle の cliToolId パラメータ化）
criteria_results.evidence: WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx:818-851 makeAutoYesToggleHandler(cliToolId) uses the closed-over cliToolId arg for BOTH the API body cliToolId (L827) and setAutoYesStateMap key (next.set(cliToolId, ...) L837). renderSplitPane passes onAutoYesToggle={makeAutoYesToggleHandler(paneCli)} (L1503) and resolves per-CLI autoYesEnabled/autoYesExpiresAt from autoYesStateMap.get(paneCli) (L1477-1479,1496-1497). Test 'routes each split toggle to its OWN onAutoYesToggle handler (per-split independence)' passes (TerminalSplitPaneContent.test.tsx:375).

criteria_results.criterion: worktree切替後も各CLI の Auto-Yes 状態は worktree スコープで保持される（既存仕様）
criteria_results.evidence: autoYesStateMap is a per-CLI Map<string,{enabled,expiresAt}> in WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx:218, the single source of truth; existing worktree-scoped persistence unchanged. Regression suite WorktreeDetailRefactored-cli-tab-switching.test.tsx passes (part of 22/22).

criteria_results.criterion: Auto-Yes ON 中は対応する split の PromptPanel が非表示（showPrompt = prompt.visible && !autoYesEnabled）
criteria_results.evidence: src/components/worktree/TerminalSplitPaneContent.tsx:166 const showPrompt = prompt.visible && !autoYesEnabled; PromptPanel rendered only when showPrompt (L208). Tests 'hides PromptPanel when autoYesEnabled=true' (L235) and 'reflects autoYesEnabled on the toggle and suppresses PromptPanel when enabled' (L343) pass.

criteria_results.criterion: Mobile の AutoYesToggle 挙動は変更なし（handleAutoYesToggle が activeCliTab 既定で動作）
criteria_results.evidence: WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx:858-862 handleAutoYesToggle = makeAutoYesToggleHandler(activeCliTab) thin wrapper preserved. Mobile AutoYesToggle (L1935-1942) unchanged: onToggle={handleAutoYesToggle}, cliToolName={activeCliTab}. Regression WorktreeDetailRefactored-mobile-overflow.test.tsx passes.

criteria_results.criterion: split0 の CLI 変更が activeCliTab へ同期される既存挙動が維持される
criteria_results.evidence: WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx:1486-1491 renderSplitPane onCliToolChange: if (splitIndex === 0) setActiveCliTab(id); preserved.

criteria_results.criterion: client-side auto-response は per-split 化しない（#501 サーバー poller 委譲）
criteria_results.evidence: useAutoYes is NOT called inside TerminalSplitPaneContent.tsx (grep finds only a doc-comment mention at L75, no hook invocation). lastAutoResponse remains activeCliTab-scoped and shared (WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx:1501). No per-split client-side auto-response store introduced.

checks.regression_tests: PASS - WorktreeDetailRefactored-cli-tab-switching + WorktreeDetailRefactored-mobile-overflow + AutoYesToggle: 22 passed / 22 total (3 files)
checks.lint: PASS - npm run lint: No ESLint warnings or errors (exit 0)
checks.build: PASS - npm run build: Compiled successfully, Generating static pages (32/32), exit 0. (A benign Next.js [ERROR] log for /api/assistant/current-output 'Dynamic server usage' appears during static analysis; the route is correctly marked ƒ Dynamic and the build completes successfully — unrelated to Issue #740.)

scope_out_notes: Non-active-split server-driven Auto-Yes sync (expiry/stop_pattern), useAutoYes refactor, and AutoYesToggle design changes were intentionally left out of scope per acceptance-context and were NOT failed.
notes: All 8 acceptance criteria verified by source inspection and test/static/build execution. Key constraints confirmed: (1) AutoYesToggle rendered in TerminalSplitPaneContent footerSlot with cliToolName={cliToolId}; (2) makeAutoYesToggleHandler(cliToolId) parameterizes both API body cliToolId and setAutoYesStateMap key, no activeCliTab hardcoding; (3) renderSplitPane distributes onAutoYesToggle={makeAutoYesToggleHandler(paneCli)} + per-CLI autoYesEnabled/autoYesExpiresAt; (4) Mobile wrapper handleAutoYesToggle=makeAutoYesToggleHandler(activeCliTab) and Mobile call site unchanged; (5) useAutoYes NOT called inside TerminalSplitPaneContent (only a doc-comment reference); (6) showPrompt = prompt.visible && !autoYesEnabled preserved; (7) split0->activeCliTab sync preserved. A noted refinement: prevAutoYesEnabledRef is updated only when toggled cliToolId === activeCliTabRef.current to preserve Issue #314 stop-reason toast detection — consistent with the work plan.
